title: Jun 4, 2026Walmart Marketplace Growth Reaches Fastest Pace in YearsWalmart's U.S. third-party marketplace grew nearly 50% in the first quarter of fiscal 2027, its fastest pace in years. title: Apr 30, 2026Amazon Is Regaining 1P Unit ShareThird-party sellers accounted for 60% of paid units sold on Amazon in Q1 2026, down from 61% in Q4 2025 and 62% the quarter before that.
